annotations.empty_hint: Click on the specific moment in the recording to add an annotation
annotations.title: Annotations

descriptions.block: Complete stoppage of airflow or sound
descriptions.escape_behavior: Physical behaviors during stuttering (eye blinks, head jerks, etc.)
descriptions.avoidance_behavior: Strategies to avoid stuttering (word substitution, etc.)
descriptions.starter_postponement: Fillers or delays before speaking (um, uh, throat clearing)

annotations.video_required: Video recording required for escape behaviors
annotations.escape_requires_video: Note: Escape behaviors require video recordings

my_exercises.title: My Exercises
my_exercises.subtitle: Practice exercises assigned by your therapist
my_exercises.subtitle_therapist: Track exercises you've assigned to your patients
my_exercises.subtitle_admin: Monitor all exercise assignments across your organization
my_exercises.no_active_exercises: You have no active exercises. Check back later!
my_exercises.no_active_exercises_therapist: No patient assignments found. Assign exercises from the Exercise Library.
my_exercises.no_active_exercises_admin: No exercise assignments found in your organization.
my_exercises.no_completed_exercises: No completed exercises yet. Keep practicing!
my_exercises.no_completed_exercises_therapist: No completed exercises found for your patients.
my_exercises.try_different_filter: Try changing the filter to see more exercises.

completion.title: Exercise Completion
completion.video_clips_note: Each annotation includes a ~10 second video clip centered around the disfluency moment for your therapist to review.
completion.audio_clips_note: Each annotation includes a ~10 second audio clip centered around the disfluency moment for your therapist to review.

deadline_stats.overdue_encouragement: The deadline has passed, but you can still complete the remaining exercises! Your therapist can see your progress.
deadline_stats.no_completions: No completions yet. Start your first exercise!

processing.title: Processing video clips...
processing.description: Your exercise has been submitted. We're extracting clips in the background. This page will update automatically when complete.

library.title: Exercise Library
library.subtitle: Create and manage exercises for your patients
library.no_exercises: No exercises found. Create your first exercise to get started.
library.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.failed_to_load: Failed to load exercises. Please try again.
errors.failed_to_create: Failed to create exercise. Please try again.
errors.failed_to_update: Failed to update exercise. Please try again.
errors.failed_to_delete: Failed to delete exercise. Please try again.
errors.failed_to_assign: Failed to assign exercise. Please try again.

mini_games.title: Mini Games
mini_games.assignment_description: Create a daily exercise assignment for your patient(s)
mini_games.schedule_description: Patient must complete the exercise once per day. Each day opens only after the previous day is completed.
mini_games.patients_helper: Select one or more patients to assign this exercise
mini_games.expected_completions_helper: How many times should the patient complete this exercise? (One per day)
mini_games.advice_helper: Optional message or instructions for the patient
mini_games.advice_placeholder: e.g., Focus on slow, gentle speech and remember to breathe...
mini_games.reference_video_helper: Upload or record a demonstration video (MP4/WebM, max 100MB)
mini_games.video_file_validation_format: Please select an MP4 or WebM video file
mini_games.video_file_validation_size: Video file must be less than 100MB
mini_games.description_placeholder: Brief description of the mini game
mini_games.no_match: No mini games match your filters
mini_games.add_exercises_hint: Add exercises from the left panel to get started

form.learn_more_url_helper: Optional link to external resources about this technique

modal.delete_confirmation_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

mini_games.videos_step_description: You can upload a personalized demonstration video for each patient, or skip this step.
mini_games.review_assignments: Please review the assignments before confirming.
mini_games.confirm_remove_video: Are you sure you want to remove this reference video?
mini_games.video_record_success: Reference video recorded and uploaded successfully

import_defaults.description: Get started quickly with 17 curated stuttering therapy exercises covering all major techniques.

validation.deadline_after_start: Deadline must be after start date
validation.expected_completions_range: Expected completions must be between 1 and 100
validation.select_patient: Please select at least one patient

mini_games.subtitle: Daily practice exercises for your patients

completion.recording_interrupted: Recording was interrupted. Please try again.
completion.title: Complete Exercise
completion.watch_reference: Watch the reference video to understand the exercise.
completion.record_subtitle: Record yourself practicing. You'll annotate it on the next screen.
completion.record_demonstration_help: Record a demonstration video to help your patient understand the exercise.
completion.mic_ready: Microphone ready - Click below to start
completion.annotation_instructions: Play back your recording and click the buttons below when you notice a disfluency at the current playback time.
completion.self_rating_label: How hard was this exercise for you?
completion.notes_placeholder: How did you feel? Any observations or questions?
completion.step_1_subtitle: Review the instructions and prepare for your practice session.
completion.techniques_instructions: If you successfully used any speech therapy techniques during your practice, mark them below at the current playback time.

errors.recording_failed: Failed to start recording. Please check your microphone/camera permissions.
errors.no_recording: Please record yourself completing the exercise first.
errors.invalid_rating: Please select a difficulty rating between 1 and 5.
errors.submit_failed: Failed to submit exercise completion. Please try again.

completion.close_warning_message: You have an unsaved recording. If you close now, your recording and notes will be lost. Are you sure you want to discard this data?
completion.close_warning_data: Data that will be lost: Recording, difficulty rating, and notes
completion.camera_permission_error: Failed to access camera and microphone. Please check permissions.
completion.recording_start_error: Failed to start recording. Please try again.

recording.annotation_instructions: Play the recording and click a button below when you hear a disfluency.
recording.annotations_saved: Your annotations have been saved successfully!
recording.backwards_compat_message: This recording uses an older format
recording.delete_annotation_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this annotation?
recording.confirm_delete_annotation: Are you sure you want to delete this annotation?
recording.no_annotations: No annotations yet. Add some as you watch.
recording.techniques_instructions: Mark when you used a therapy technique.
recording.confirm_discard_changes: Are you sure you want to discard your changes?
recording.annotation_instructions_short: Click buttons while playing to mark

mark.label: Mark
mark.description: Play the recording and tap buttons to mark disfluencies and techniques as you hear them.
mark.empty: Play the recording and tap the buttons above to mark what you hear.

review.label: Review & Notes
review.description: Review your annotations, add notes, and make adjustments.
review.empty: No annotations yet. Go back to the Mark phase to add some.

nav.mark_hint: Mark at least one moment to continue.

identification.empty_therapist: Watch the video and mark any stuttering moments you notice. This helps you learn to recognize different types of disfluencies.
identification.empty_own: Review your recording and mark any moments where you noticed stuttering. Take your time,this is about building awareness, not perfection.

watch.title: Observe & Absorb
watch.description: Watch this video from beginning to end. Notice how speech flows naturally, and how moments of stuttering appear. There is nothing to do yet , just observe with curiosity.
watch.revisit_hint: You can return to re-watch at any point.

identify_primary.title: Mark Primary Disfluencies
identify_primary.description: Play the video and tap a button whenever you notice a primary disfluency.
identify_primary.tip: It's okay to miss some. This is about building awareness, not perfection.
identify_primary.empty: Play the video and mark what you notice. Take your time.

classify.title: Classify Your Moments
classify.description: Review each moment you marked. For each one, note whether the disfluency was short or long, and whether you noticed soft or tense muscle involvement.

identify_secondary.title: Add Secondary Behaviours
identify_secondary.description: Watch the video once more and look for secondary behaviours , movements or strategies that accompany stuttering.
identify_secondary.tip: Secondary behaviours are subtle. It is perfectly fine to mark none.

nav.minimum_moments: Mark at least one moment before continuing.

identification.default_instructions: Watch the video and identify moments of disfluency.
identification.marker_hint: Click to seek, double-click to remove
identification.record_yourself_description: Record a short video of yourself speaking. You'll then review it to identify moments of disfluency.

clip_rounds.identify_description: Watch this short clip and tap a button whenever you notice a disfluency. If there is nothing to mark, that's fine.
clip_rounds.classify_description: For each moment you marked, note whether it was short or long, and soft or tense.
clip_rounds.empty: Watch the clip and mark what you notice.
clip_rounds.empty_pool_description: Practice clips are not ready for this exercise yet. Check back later.

identification.nudge_back_100: Back one tenth of a second
identification.nudge_fwd_100: Forward one tenth of a second

reflection.text_placeholder: Take a moment to reflect and write your thoughts here...
reflection.camera_error: Could not access camera. Please check your permissions.
reflection.default_instructions: Take a moment to reflect on your experience.

exit_speed.very_slow_desc: Hold the moment and exit very slowly, with full control
exit_speed.medium_desc: Hold the moment and exit at a moderate, comfortable pace
exit_speed.natural_desc: Hold the moment and exit at a natural speaking pace

holding.ready_description: When you start, hold a stuttering moment for {{seconds}} seconds, then exit smoothly.
holding.timer_complete: Great! You held for the full duration.
holding.continue_until_done: Continue until you've completed your exit, then stop recording.
holding.guided_description: We'll guide you through {{cycles}} holding moments. Just follow the rhythm.
holding.exercise_complete_message: You completed all {{count}} guided holding cycles.
holding.phase_ready_desc: Whenever you feel a moment, press and hold.
holding.hold_description: We'll guide you through {{cycles}} holding moments. Press and hold whenever you feel a stuttering moment.
holding.duration_target_desc: Hold the moment for {{seconds}} seconds, then exit smoothly.
holding.default_instructions: Hold the moment of stuttering and exit smoothly.

step.easy_voluntary_desc: Practice easy repetitions. Mark when you're doing voluntary (controlled) stuttering.
step.voluntary_with_force_desc: Exaggerate the tension. Press the Force button when you start using force, and Release when you let go.
step.voluntary_without_force_desc: Same stuttering moments, but now soft and controlled. Mark the moments to show your control.

motor_control.ready_desc: Start recording and practice voluntary stuttering. Use the button to mark your moments.
motor_control.ready_force_desc: Start recording and use the buttons below to mark when you're using force and when you release.
motor_control.no_moments_hint: No moments were marked. Try holding the button during each stuttering moment.
motor_control.default_instructions: Practice voluntary stuttering to build motor control.

journal.prompts_title: Writing prompts to get you started
journal.mood_label: How are you feeling right now?
journal.placeholder: Take your time. Write freely about your thoughts and feelings...

prompts.feelings_today: How am I feeling about my speech today?
prompts.what_went_well: What went well in my practice?
prompts.next_steps: What do I want to focus on next?

journal.default_instructions: Write about your feelings and experiences with speech today.

level.very_long_desc: Take a full 3-second pause. Breathe and relax.
level.medium_desc: A comfortable 2-second pause. Feel the stillness.
level.short_desc: A brief 1-second pause. Quick and natural.

pause.ready_description: Start recording and press the pause button (or spacebar) {{count}} times to practice intentional pauses.

error.no_media_devices: Your browser does not support audio recording. Please try a different browser.
error.permission_denied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings and try again.
error.no_microphone: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone and try again.
error.generic: Could not access your microphone. Please check your settings and try again.

pause.default_instructions: Practice natural pausing in your speech.
pause.no_pauses_hint: No pauses were marked. Try holding the button each time you pause in your speech.
pause.ready_hold_description: Start recording and hold the button each time you pause. Aim for about {{duration}} seconds per pause, {{count}} times.

disclosure.practice_description: Practice saying a disclosure phrase out loud with confidence.

level_desc.1: The other person is patient and supportive.
level_desc.2: The other person is neutral and speaks at a normal pace.
level_desc.3: The other person is slightly rushed, creating realistic pressure.

prompts.1: I sometimes stutter, so I may take a moment.
prompts.2: Just so you know, I'm a person who stutters , it's just how I talk.
prompts.3: Before we begin, I want you to know that I stutter. I'd appreciate your patience.

disclosure.choose_prompt: Choose a disclosure prompt to practice:
disclosure.ready_description: Take a breath, then record yourself saying the disclosure phrase with confidence.
disclosure.default_instructions: Practice sharing about your speech in a safe space.

generalisation.ready_description: Record yourself practicing the scenario. Mark each technique you use as you go.
generalisation.mark_techniques: Mark techniques as you use them:
generalisation.self_rating: How do you feel about this practice?
generalisation.default_instructions: Apply your techniques in this real-world scenario.
generalisation.default_prompt: Practice using your techniques naturally in conversation.
generalisation.ready_hold_description: Record yourself practicing the scenario. Select a technique, then hold the button while using it.
generalisation.no_techniques_hint: No techniques were marked. Try selecting a technique and holding the button while using it.

self_modeling.watch_first: Watch the full video before reflecting
self_modeling.notes_placeholder: What did you notice? Any specific moments you want to remember?
self_modeling.default_instructions: Watch your recording and reflect on your practice.

submissions.page_subtitle: Review all patient submissions across exercises, scenarios, and assessments
submissions.select_patient_description: Choose a patient to view their submissions
submissions.no_submissions_description: This patient hasn't completed any exercises or activities yet.
submissions.no_results_description: No submissions match the current filters. Try adjusting your criteria.

reading_prompt.mode_topic_desc: Tell us your interests and we'll suggest topics
reading_prompt.mode_passage_desc: We'll generate a text for you to read aloud
reading_prompt.topic_placeholder: Enter a topic for your passage...
reading_prompt.pick_a_topic: What should your passage be about?
reading_prompt.error: Could not generate a passage. Try again.
reading_prompt.topics_error: Could not load topics. Try again.
reading_prompt.mode_words_desc: Read random words to practice with

observation.default_instructions: Watch the video carefully, then rate the communicator on each dimension.
observation.encouragement: There are no right or wrong answers. Rate what you observe.
observation.watch_first: Watch the full video before completing the observation grid

technique_rating.title: How did that feel?
technique_rating.description: Rate your experience with this exercise.

recording_duration_hint: Longer recordings (3+ minutes) help your therapist give better feedback.
manage_patient_exercises: Manage exercises assigned to this patient
no_assignments_description: This patient doesn't have any exercises assigned yet. Click the button above to assign exercises.

retry_reason.title: No problem , let's try again
retry_reason.description: If you'd like, let us know what happened. It helps track your progress.

device_picker.grant_access: Allow access to see device names
